subcodes.title: Prayer written at the request of Karbala'i 'Ali Asghar Khurasani
subcodes.first_line: God bore witness to His servant that he believed in God and His verses, and he was of those who are guided. O my God! I bear witness to You by that which you bear witness to Yourself and the saints who have drawn nigh among Your servants
subcodes.first_line_orig: بسم الله الرحمن الرحیم. شهد الله لعبده انه من بالله و ایاته و کان من المهتدین الهی انی اشهدک بما تشهد لنفسک
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for praise and gratitude, @prayer for forgiveness, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @justice and wrath of God
